pages.raw_text:
Woman suffragists will seek an
amendment to the national con;
stitution at the opening of con.
gress. To label their friends and
foes they are getting lists of all
candidates for both houses and
will "heckle" them with these ques-
tons:


Are you in favor of full suf-
frage for women?"


Are you in favor of municipal
suffrage for women?"


Are you in favor of school suf
frage for women?"


Are you in favor of suffrage in
any form for taxpaying womenw


"Are you opposed to any form
of suffrage for women?"


If in favor OF full suffrage fol-
women. do you approve of an
amendment to the United States
constitution in effect as follows
The rights OF citizens of the Unit
ed States TO vote shall not be de
MED or abridged by the United
States or by any state thereof or
account of sex"
